title: Greg's Team SMP
description: A lightweight team & claim plugin for Minecraft SMPs. Manage your territory, protect your land and dominate the map with your team.
body:
# 🏰 Greg's Team SMP

**A lightweight and powerful team & claim plugin built for Minecraft SMPs.**
Manage your territory, protect your land, and dominate the map with your team.

---

## ✨ Features

### 🤝 Team Management
Create and manage your team with a simple and intuitive command system. Invite players, kick members, or disband your team at any time.

### 🗺️ Land Claiming
Claim chunks to protect your territory from other teams. Claim a single chunk or an entire area at once with the radius claim system. Operators can bypass claim protection at any time.

### 📺 Interactive Map
Visualize all claims around you directly in the chat with `/team map`, or keep the map permanently visible in your scoreboard with `/team scoreboard`. Each team is displayed with a unique color.

### 🔔 Claim Notifications
A title automatically appears on screen whenever you enter or leave a claimed territory, so you always know where you are.

### ⚙️ Compatibility
- ✅ Paper / _Spigot_ support _(**PAPER is highly recommended**)_
- ✅ Cracked player support
- ✅ Minecraft 26.1.X & 1.21.X support

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/team create <name>` | Create a new team |
| `/team disband` | Disband your team |
| `/team invite <player>` | Invite a player to your team |
| `/team join` | Join a team you were invited to |
| `/team kick <player>` | Kick a member from your team |
| `/team leave` | Leave your current team |
| `/team info` | Display your team information |
| `/team claim` | Claim the chunk you're standing on |
| `/team unclaim` | Unclaim the chunk you're standing on |
| `/team radiusclaim <radius>` | Claim a square area around you (max 6) |
| `/team map` | Display the claim map in chat |
| `/team scoreboard` | Toggle the claim map in the scoreboard |
| `/team admin delete <team>` | Disband a team (Admin command // gregsteamsmp.admin) |
| `/team admin unclaim <team>` | Unclaim a chunk of a team (Admin command // gregsteamsmp.admin) |

---

## 📦 Installation
Drop the `.jar` into your `plugins/` folder and restart your server. No dependencies required.

---

*Made with ❤️ by Gregwl*
